global_description: A small, round-bodied songbird with a predominantly olive-green back and wings. It features a bright yellow underbelly and throat, with a distinctive gray head and a white eye ring. The bird has a slender, pointed beak and short, rounded tail.
discriminative_attributes: Gray head with white eye ring

part_details.head: Gray with a prominent white eye ring, small and rounded.
part_details.back: Olive-green, smooth feathers covering the upper body.
part_details.underbelly: Bright yellow, contrasting with the darker back.
part_details.wings: Olive-green, short and rounded with smooth feathers.
part_details.tail: Short, rounded, matching the olive-green of the wings.

spatial_relations: The gray head transitions into the olive-green back.
The bright yellow underbelly is below the gray head and olive-green back.
The wings are attached to the sides of the olive-green back.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
